items.title: Extend envelope registry to remaining artifact types
items.description: ENVELOPE_REGISTRY covers 4 of ~8 artifact types. debt, health, gap-assessment, rules-update, recovery-packet commands hardcode envelope values inline.

items.title: Duplicated SchemaNode interface across schema-template.ts and output.ts
items.description: SchemaNode is defined independently in schema-template.ts (bare index signature) and output.ts (typed fields). Should be a shared type to prevent drift.

items.title: schema command uses inline stderr/exit instead of output.ts utilities
items.description: commands/schema.ts writes directly to process.stderr and calls process.exit(1), violating the output.ts contract that says no command should write directly. Should use a generic error helper from output.ts.
